name: Research Data Pipeline Class Diagram with Abstract Classes and Interfaces
input: Create a class diagram for a research data processing pipeline using design patterns. Classes: abstract class DataSource with methods connect() and fetchData(), concrete subclasses PubMedSource, ClinicalTrialsSource, and GenBankSource extending DataSource. Interface Transformable with method transform(data). Class DataCleaner implements Transformable with methods: removeNulls(), normalizeFields(), deduplicate(). Class FeatureExtractor implements Transformable with methods: extractKeywords(), computeMetrics(). Abstract class DataSink with method persist(data), concrete subclasses PostgresSink and S3Sink extending DataSink. Class Pipeline orchestrates everything with fields: sources DataSource[], transformers Transformable[], sink DataSink, and methods: run(), validate(), getStatus(). Pipeline has composition relationship with DataSource (1 to many), aggregation with Transformable (1 to many), and composition with DataSink (1 to 1). Show inheritance arrows, interface implementation, and composition/aggregation.
qualityCriteria: Abstract class DataSource present with <<abstract>> annotation
At least 3 concrete subclasses of DataSource
Pipeline class with orchestration fields and methods
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Class diagram with 9+ classes, abstract classes, interface, inheritance, composition/aggregation, design pattern.
